category_sources: source_facts.description says object-file caching compiler wrapper; official ccache README describes ccache as a compiler cache that speeds recompilation by caching previous compilations.
display_name_sources: Official website and GitHub README use Ccache/ccache; source_facts.name is ccache.
docs_sources: Official ccache documentation page lists the latest manual; source_facts.version is 4.13.6 and the official documentation page links Version 4.13.6 as latest.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ccache/ccache, so repo is returned as null per instruction not to second-guess existing repository values.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a caching compiler wrapper; official GitHub README topics include compiler, cache, gcc, clang, C, and C++.
